participationGraph.title: Participation graph
participationGraph.description: Organizations and relationships in your participation network.
participationGraph.emptyDescription: Child organizations and matrix links will appear here as your network grows.
participationGraph.findPathHint: Click two organizations to highlight the shortest path between them.
participationGraph.findPathNoPath: No path found between these organizations.

inviteMembersDescription: Invite new members to join your organization by email.
failedToLoadVoteEventLog: Failed to load vote event log
orgNameMinLength: Organization name must be at least 2 characters
orgNameMaxLength: Organization name must be less than 100 characters
selectAtLeastOneRepresentative: Please select at least one representative
enterRepresentativeEmail: Please enter at least one representative email address
noOrganizationsDescription: Organizations are collaborative spaces where groups can make democratic decisions.
createOrgDescription: Create a collaborative space for democratic decision-making. Only administrators can create organizations.
descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the organization's purpose and goals
votingThresholdHint: Percentage of votes needed to pass proposals (e.g. 75 = 75%)
memberLocationsDescription: One pin per city; the number shows how many members are in that city.
locationUpdateOncePerDay: You can update your location once per day. Try again tomorrow.
membersCanAddCityAbove: Members can add their city in the section above.
citySearchFailed: Could not load city suggestions. Check your connection or try again.
noCitiesFound: No cities found. Try a different name.
accessRestrictedDescription: You don't have permission to view transparency data for this organization.
accessRestrictedRepDescription: Only representatives can access this tab.
transparencySubtitle: Organization metrics, history, and governance transparency
calendarNoEventsDescription: Deadlines and election phases will appear here.
calendarSubscribeDialogDescription: Add this calendar to Google Calendar, Outlook, or Apple Calendar. It stays in sync as events change.
calendarSubscribeHelpGoogle: Google Calendar: Settings → Add calendar → From URL, then paste the subscription URL.
calendarSubscribeHelpApple: Apple Calendar: File → New Calendar Subscription, then paste the webcal URL.
calendarSubscribeExpires: This link expires on {{date}}. Open Subscribe again to get a fresh URL.
calendarSubscribeAllOrgsDescription: One calendar feed with events from every organization you belong to.
schedulingSlotTimesRequired: Start and end time are required
schedulingParticipationDeadlineFuture: Participation deadline must be in the future
schedulingCloseParticipationConfirm: Stop accepting new responses? Members and guests will no longer be able to submit availability.
schedulingClickDragToggle: Click and drag to toggle; saved automatically.
schedulingMouseoverSeeWho: Mouse over a time to see availability.
schedulingOrGenerateMany: Or generate many from date & time range
schedulingNoPollsDescription: Create a poll to find a time that works for everyone.
regenerateGuestLinkConfirm: Old guest links will stop working. Anyone with the old link will no longer be able to access this poll.
meetingsEmptyDescription: Schedule a meeting and add a video room or paste a link.
meetingScheduleViaPoll: Let participants vote on the date (create scheduling poll)
meetingScheduleViaPollHint: A scheduling poll will be created with this title. Add time slots, then create the meeting from the poll once it's finalized.
datePollCreated: Date poll created. Add time slots, then finalize and create the meeting.
noMinutesDocumentYet: No minutes document for this meeting yet.
followLiveDescription: When on, the timeline scrolls to the latest on each update. When off, it scrolls only to the block that changed.
datePollCreated: Date poll created. Add slots and share the link so people can vote.
couldNotEmbed: Could not embed; open in new tab
voteOptionsMinTwo: At least two options are required
finalizeConfirm: Finalize minutes? This will lock the minutes document.
finalizeConfirmSummary: {{agendaCount}} agenda item(s), {{paragraphCount}} paragraph(s), and {{voteCount}} vote(s) will be locked.
addParagraphHeadingAndBodyHint: Section is optional. You can add a heading, body text, or both.
paragraphNoContent: No content — click Edit to add text.
minutesTipsBody: Focus on decisions and action items. For each action item, assign an owner and a deadline.
timelineEmpty: No entries yet. Add a paragraph to get started.
timelineEmptyDescription: Set the current topic above, then add a paragraph or start a vote.
editProposedToast: Edit proposed; it will appear after approval.
editProposedHint: Your change will be added to the minutes after others vote to approve it.
todoOnlyStatusEditableAfterFinalize: Only status can be changed after minutes are finalized.
declineVoteDescription: Provide a reason for declining this vote. The proposer will receive this reason via email.
completeVoteConfirmDescription: This will close voting and apply the outcome based on current votes.
noActiveRuleProposalsDescription: Rule change proposals from representatives will appear here. Go to Governance to create one.
noDocumentsInVotingPhaseDescription: Documents that enter the voting phase will appear here. Go to Documents to see the full list.
noDiscussionsYetDescription: Comments and discussions on documents will appear here.
noActiveElectionsOrVotesDescription: When representatives create elections or organization votes, they will appear here.
dashboardNoAwaitingVotes: No paragraph votes or amendment actions need your attention.
dashboardViewAllPending: View all pending in Activity Feed
dashboardReplacePinDescription: Only one event can be pinned on the overview. This will replace the current one.
dashboardPinnedEventUnavailable: This pinned event is no longer available
dashboardCannotPinPastEvent: Only upcoming events can be pinned
dashboardNoUpcomingEvents: Nothing scheduled in the next two weeks
dashboardNoUpcomingEventsDescription: Meetings, deadlines, and election dates will appear here.
noActiveVotesOrDiscussions: No active votes or discussions at the moment
manageDecisionsDescription: Manage organization decisions and representative responsibilities
agreedDocumentAmendmentHint: Agreed document is open for amendment proposals. Close amendments to finalize.
noRepresentativeActionsRequired: No representative actions required at this time.
voteApprovedAndOpened: Vote approved and opened for voting
voteDeclinedProposerNotified: Vote declined. The proposer has been notified.
failedToVoteOnRuleProposal: Failed to vote on rule proposal
completeVoteConfirmMistrust: This will finalize the vote and calculate results. If this mistrust vote passes, the representative will be removed.
completeVoteConfirmStandard: This will finalize the vote and calculate results. The vote status will be updated to either "passed" or "failed" based on the threshold and quorum requirements.
representativeActionsDescription: Complete votes, approve proposals, and manage document voting

brandingDialog.title: Customize Organization Design
brandingDialog.description: Customize the appearance of your organization, including branding, icons, and fonts. Changes will be visible to all members.
brandingDialog.colorHint: Enter a hex color code or use the color picker
brandingDialog.logoUploadHint: Upload an image (max {{maxMb}}MB). PNG, JPG, or GIF recommended.
brandingDialog.customTitleHint: Leave empty to use the organization name. Max 100 characters.
brandingDialog.bannerUploadHint: Upload an image file (max 5MB). PNG, JPG, or GIF recommended.
brandingDialog.bannerUrlHint: Enter a direct image URL (HTTP or HTTPS). Max 2000 characters.
brandingDialog.iconSetHint: Choose the icon style for your organization. Affects all icons throughout the interface.
brandingDialog.fontFamilyHint: Choose the font family for your organization. Applies to all text in the interface.

toasts.imageTooLarge: Image size should be less than {{maxMb}}MB
toasts.invalidImage: Invalid or corrupted image file. Please select a valid image.
toasts.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL
toasts.urlLoadFailed: Failed to load image from URL. Please check the URL is valid and points to an image.
toasts.invalidHexColor: Please enter a valid hex color code (e.g., #3B82F6)

onlyRepresentativesCanManageReps: Only representatives can manage organization representatives.
representativesManagementCardDescription: Manage organization representatives who make executive decisions
proposalNotFoundOrProcessed: Proposal not found or already processed
nominateRepresentativeDescription: Select an active member to nominate as a representative. Only active members can be nominated.
noAvailableMembersToNominate: No available members to nominate. All active members are already representatives, or there are no active members in the organization.
resignRemainActiveAlert: You will remain active until your replacement is elected. An election will be automatically scheduled to fill your position.
initiateMistrustVoteDescription: Initiate a democratic vote to remove {{name}} as a representative. All organization members will vote on this decision.
mistrustVoteAlert: This will create a mistrust vote that all members can participate in. The vote must meet the organization's threshold and quorum requirements to pass. A representative must approve the vote before voting begins.
representativesListDescription: Organization representatives who make executive decisions
representativesListContactDescription: Contact organization representatives who make executive decisions
protocolCanvas.proposeOrgVoteSuccess: Organization vote proposed from meeting decision.
protocolCanvas.proposeOrgVoteNeedsText: Decision needs a title or text to propose a vote.
protocolCanvas.brainstormOpenHint: Collect ideas or conclude the brainstorm when ready.
protocolCanvas.brainstormClosedHint: This brainstorm is no longer accepting new options.
protocolCanvas.votePayloadFallback: Vote payload is not available yet. Showing safe fallback details from timeline event data.
protocolCanvas.topicNoEntriesYet: No entries for this topic yet.
protocolCanvas.reorderCanvasHint: Drag entries to change order. Turn off reorder to return to protocol view.
protocolCanvas.fallback.decisionFlow: Bundled brainstorm, vote, and decision sequence.

membersTab.confirmRemove: Remove this member from the organization?
membersTab.confirmLeave: Leave {{name}}? You will lose access to organization documents and activity.
membersTab.confirmLeaveRep: Leave {{name}}? A replacement election will be created for the remaining representatives before you leave.
membersTab.leaveSuccessWithElection: You have left the organization. Remaining representatives should start the replacement election in Governance.
membersTab.cannotLeaveLastRepresentative: You cannot leave as the last active representative. Invite or promote another representative first.

transparencySection.verifyVoteResultsDescription: Verify that announced counts match the ballots for closed votes and elections.
transparencySection.noClosedVotesToVerify: No closed votes or elections to verify yet
transparencySection.voteEventLogDescription: Recent vote events for this organization (immutable log). Each entry links to the previous for chain verification.
transparencySection.noVoteEventsInLog: No vote events for this organization in the recent log
transparencySection.governanceHistoryDescription: Public record of all organizational decisions and actions
transparencySection.governanceHistoryEmptyDescription: Actions will appear here as the organization makes decisions
transparencySection.transparencyNoticeBody: This public governance dashboard shows all organizational decisions and actions. Some sensitive details are hidden to protect privacy, but all major governance activities are visible to ensure accountability.
transparencySection.contestsLoadFailed: Failed to load decisions to verify
transparencySection.myReceiptsDescription: Receipts from votes you cast. Use them to confirm your vote appears on the official record after voting closes.
transparencySection.noReceiptsYet: No saved receipts yet. Receipts appear here after you vote.
transparencySection.proContraVerifiedSummary: Independent check complete — recounted ballots match the published result.
transparencySection.proContraMismatchSummary: Recounted ballots do not match the published result. Contact a representative or download the export.
transparencySection.electionVerifiedSummary: Ballot count matches the official election record.
transparencySection.electionMismatchSummary: Ballot count does not match the official election record.
transparencySection.meetingVerifiedSummary: Option totals match the published meeting vote result.
transparencySection.meetingMismatchSummary: Option totals do not match the published meeting vote result.
transparencySection.verifyStep1: Export anonymized ballots from the closed vote.
transparencySection.verifyStep2: Recount votes using the same rules as the server.
transparencySection.verifyStep3: Compare the recount to the announced result.

voteReceipt.title: Your vote was recorded
voteReceipt.description: Save this receipt ID to verify your vote was counted after voting closes.
voteReceipt.keepSafe: Keep this ID — it proves your vote was recorded without revealing how you voted.
voteReceipt.foundOnList: Your receipt appears on the official list for this vote.
voteReceipt.notFoundYet: Receipt not found on the official list yet (vote may still be open).
